always_include_colors: Available in multiple colors or custom multicolor by request.
listing_prompt:
You are writing an Etsy product listing for a handcrafted collectible sold by '{store_name}'.

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Do NOT mention 3D printing, filament, nozzle, or layer height anywhere
- You may mention 'handcrafted' or 'made in our studio' at most once, subtly
- Focus entirely on the product as a finished object — its design, character, and appeal
- Tone: friendly, warm, conversational — like a passionate maker talking to a fan
- No corporate language, no spec-sheet writing

Product details:
- Character / Subject: {character}
- Product type: {subtitle}
- Color scheme: {material}
- Size: {size_label} (approx. {dims_in})
- Weight: {weight_g}g = ~{weight_oz} oz
- Price: {price}
- Ships from: {ships_from}
- Audience: {audience}

Generate a listing in this EXACT structure with these exact emoji headers:

[Opening paragraph — 3-5 sentences. Hook the buyer with the personality and vibe of the product. Who is this for? What does it feel like to own it? Make it desirable. Zero manufacturing mention.]

🧩 Features:
- [Standout design or visual detail]
- [Functional benefit or practical use]
- [Character detail — pose, expression, accessory, etc.]
- [Durability or quality framed as a product trait, not a process]
- {always_include_colors}

🧱 What's Included:
- {character} {subtitle} (one-piece, no assembly required)
- [Any accessories or extras, or 'Accessories not included' if relevant]

📐 Dimensions (assembled):
{dims_in}

⚖️ Weight:
{weight_g}g = ~{weight_oz} oz

🎨 Color Example Shown:
{material} — [describe finish/look in one phrase]
(Custom colors available on request)

🛠️ Ideal For:
- [Primary fan or fandom audience]
- [Use case — desk, shelf, office, dorm, display]
- [Gift occasion — birthday, holiday, graduation]
- [Secondary audience]
- [Collector or decor angle]

Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no markdown:
{
  "title": "Etsy title max 140 chars, SEO optimized, no mention of 3D printing, include character name and product type and key fandom keywords",
  "description": "The full listing text following the structure above exactly",
  "tags": "exactly 13 comma-separated Etsy tags, SEO optimized, no 3D printing tags, mix of character, fandom, product type, gift, and decor terms"
}
analyze_prompt:
You are analyzing a photo of a handcrafted collectible product for an Etsy listing.

Examine the image carefully. Only fill fields you are confident about — use null for anything unclear.

Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no markdown:
{
  "character_name": "The character or subject name (e.g. Mario, Master Chief, Alien Xenomorph). null if unclear.",
  "color_scheme": "Multi-Color or Single-Color based on visible colors. null if unclear.",
  "object_type": "What kind of product is this? e.g. Pen Holder, Action Figure, Helmet, Keychain, Desk Organizer. null if unclear.",
  "subtitle": "A short product subtitle combining character and type, e.g. Pen & Pencil Holder · Desk Organizer, Collectible Figure · Shelf Display. null if unclear.",
  "size_estimate": "small, medium, or large. small = under 10cm, medium = 10-20cm, large = over 20cm.",
  "size_confidence": "high, medium, or low",
  "character_confidence": "high, medium, or low",
  "color_confidence": "high, medium, or low",
  "notes": "One short observation about the product, or null."
}
